'''farovo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:squamosin|squamosin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-r-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:squamosin|squamosin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| farovo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:færeveth|færeveth]] || [[word:færevej|færevej]] || [[word:færevesh|færevesh]] || [[word:færeve|færeve]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:farorovoth|farorovoth]] || [[word:farorovoj|farorovoj]] || [[word:farorovosh|farorovosh]] || [[word:farorovo|farorovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:farovoth|farovoth]] || [[word:farovoj|farovoj]] || [[word:farovosh|farovosh]] || [[word:farovo|farovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:farofvofth|farofvofth]] || [[word:farofvofj|farofvofj]] || [[word:farofvofsh|farofvofsh]] || [[word:farofvof|farofvof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:farovotho|farovotho]] || [[word:farovojo|farovojo]] || [[word:farovosho|farovosho]] || [[word:farovoko|farovoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:farovoth|farovoth]] || [[word:farovoj|farovoj]] || [[word:farovosh|farovosh]] || [[word:farovo|farovo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:farovothol|farovothol]] || [[word:farovojol|farovojol]] || [[word:farovoshol|farovoshol]] || [[word:farovokol|farovokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:farovoothotho|farovoothotho]] || [[word:farovoojojo|farovoojojo]] || [[word:farovooshosho|farovooshosho]] || [[word:farovooko|farovooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:farovothon|farovothon]] || [[word:farovojon|farovojon]] || [[word:farovoshon|farovoshon]] || [[word:farovokon|farovokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:farovothooro|farovothooro]] || [[word:farovojooro|farovojooro]] || [[word:farovoshooro|farovoshooro]] || [[word:farovokooro|farovokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1a7b009}}
